employment.prefix: Senior software engineer building agentic data security at

artificialTaste.title: Artificial Taste
artificialTaste.reflection: I'm a big believer in the idea that you're a combination of the five people you spend the most time with. As more people add an LLM or three to their top five, what does that do to our culture? I'm starting by mapping the taste of each model family.

forecastBench.title: ForecastBench
forecastBench.suffix: , a competition to see if models can beat the best superforecasters at predicting the future.
